content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "Final Service Task: 在餐廳點餐",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "你好，歡迎光臨！請問今天想吃什麼？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ hǎo, huānyíng guānglín! Qǐngwèn jīntiān xiǎng chī shénme?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hao3, huan1ying2 guang1lin2! Qing3wen4 jin1tian1 xiang3 chi1 shen2me?",
          "translation_en": "Hello, welcome! What would you like to eat today?",
          "translation_ko": "안녕하세요, 환영합니다! 오늘 무엇을 드시고 싶으세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "你好，我想要一份牛肉麵，不要辣，謝謝。",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ hǎo, wǒ xiǎng yào yī fèn niúròumiàn, bù yào là, xièxie.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hao3, wo3 xiang3 yao4 yi1 fen4 niu2rou4mian4, bu4 yao4 la4, xie4xie.",
          "translation_en": "Hello, I'd like one bowl of beef noodles, no spicy, thank you.",
          "translation_ko": "안녕하세요, 소고기 국수 한 그릇 주세요, 맵지 않게 해 주세요, 감사합니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "好的，牛肉麵一份，不要辣。還要別的嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, niúròumiàn yī fèn, bù yào là. Hái yào bié de ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, niu2rou4mian4 yi1 fen4, bu4 yao4 la4. Hai2 yao4 bie2 de ma?",
          "translation_en": "Okay, one beef noodles, no spicy. Anything else?",
          "translation_ko": "네, 소고기 국수 한 그릇, 맵지 않게요. 다른 것도 드릴까요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "還要一杯紅茶，少冰，內用。",
          "pinyin": "Hái yào yī bēi hóngchá, shǎo bīng, nèiyòng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hai2 yao4 yi1 bei1 hong2cha2, shao3 bing1, nei4yong4.",
          "translation_en": "Also a cup of black tea, less ice, for here.",
          "translation_ko": "홍차 한 잔도 주세요, 얼음 적게, 매장에서 먹을게요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "沒問題。總共是兩百一十塊。請問要怎麼付款？",
          "pinyin": "Méi wèntí. Zǒnggòng shì liǎng bǎi yī shí kuài. Qǐngwèn yào zěnme fùkuǎn?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Mei2 wen4ti2. Zong3gong4 shi4 liang3 bai3 yi1 shi2 kuai4. Qing3wen4 yao4 zen3me fu4kuan3?",
          "translation_en": "No problem. The total is 210 dollars. How would you like to pay?",
          "translation_ko": "문제없습니다. 총 210원입니다. 어떻게 결제하시겠습니까?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "我用信用卡付款。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ yòng xìnyòngkǎ fùkuǎn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 yong4 xin4yong4ka3 fu4kuan3.",
          "translation_en": "I'll pay with a credit card.",
          "translation_ko": "신용카드로 결제할게요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "好的，請在這裡刷卡。這是您的發票，請拿好。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, qǐng zài zhèlǐ shuākǎ. Zhè shì nín de fāpiào, qǐng ná hǎo.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, qing3 zai4 zhe4li3 shua1ka3. Zhe4 shi4 nin2 de fa1piao4, qing3 na2 hao3.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, please swipe your card here. Here is your receipt, please take it.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 여기서 카드를 긁어 주세요. 영수증입니다, 잘 챙기세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "謝謝，請問洗手間在哪裡？",
          "pinyin": "Xièxie, qǐngwèn xǐshǒujiān zài nǎlǐ?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Xie4xie, qing3wen4 xi3shou3jian1 zai4 na3li3?",
          "translation_en": "Thank you, where is the restroom?",
          "translation_ko": "감사합니다, 화장실이 어디에 있나요?"
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What did the customer order?",
          "question_ko": "손님은 무엇을 주문했습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Beef noodles and black tea", "Chicken rice and green tea", "Pork noodles and coffee"],
          "options_ko": ["소고기 국수와 홍차", "닭고기밥과 녹차", "돼지고기 국수와 커피"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "請跟著店員和客人的對話，練習說出每一句話，注意語調和速度。",
      "free_response_prompt": "請用中文說出你最近一次在餐廳點餐的經驗，包括你點了什麼、怎麼付款、餐廳的服務如何。"
    },
    {
      "title": "Final Social Task: 約朋友看電影",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你好，這個週末你有空嗎？我們一起去看電影好不好？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ hǎo, zhège zhōumò nǐ yǒu kòng ma? Wǒmen yīqǐ qù kàn diànyǐng hǎo bù hǎo?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hao3, zhe4ge zhou1mo4 ni3 you3 kong4 ma? Wo3men yi1qi3 qu4 kan4 dian4ying3 hao3 bu4 hao3?",
          "translation_en": "Hello, are you free this weekend? How about we go see a movie together?",
          "translation_ko": "안녕하세요, 이번 주말에 시간 있으세요? 같이 영화 보러 갈까요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "好啊！我星期六下午有空。你想看什麼電影？",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo a! Wǒ xīngqīliù xiàwǔ yǒu kòng. Nǐ xiǎng kàn shénme diànyǐng?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 a! Wo3 xing1qi1liu4 xia4wu3 you3 kong4. Ni3 xiang3 kan4 shen2me dian4ying3?",
          "translation_en": "Sure! I'm free Saturday afternoon. What movie do you want to see?",
          "translation_ko": "좋아요! 토요일 오후에 시간 있어요. 무슨 영화 보고 싶으세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "我聽說最近有一部新的台灣電影，聽說很好看。我們去看那個好不好？",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ tīngshuō zuìjìn yǒu yī bù xīn de táiwān diànyǐng, tīngshuō hěn hǎokàn. Wǒmen qù kàn nàge hǎo bù hǎo?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 ting1shuo1 zui4jin4 you3 yi1 bu4 xin1 de tai2wan1 dian4ying3, ting1shuo1 hen3 hao3kan4. Wo3men qu4 kan4 na4ge hao3 bu4 hao3?",
          "translation_en": "I heard there's a new Taiwanese movie recently, and it's supposed to be very good. How about we go see that?",
          "translation_ko": "최근에 새 대만 영화가 나왔다고 들었는데, 재미있다고 해요. 그거 보러 갈까요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "好啊！星期六下午兩點，在電影院門口見面，可以嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo a! Xīngqīliù xiàwǔ liǎng diǎn, zài diànyǐngyuàn ménkǒu jiànmiàn, kěyǐ ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 a! Xing1qi1liu4 xia4wu3 liang3 dian3, zai4 dian4ying3yuan4 men2kou3 jian4mian4, ke3yi3 ma?",
          "translation_en": "Sure! Saturday at 2 PM, meet at the movie theater entrance, okay?",
          "translation_ko": "좋아요! 토요일 오후 2시에 영화관 입구에서 만날까요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "沒問題，到時候見！",
          "pinyin": "Méi wèntí, dào shíhou jiàn!",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Mei2 wen4ti2, dao4 shi2hou jian4!",
          "translation_en": "No problem, see you then!",
          "translation_ko": "문제없어요, 그때 봐요!"
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "When will A and B meet?",
          "question_ko": "A와 B는 언제 만나기로 했습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Saturday at 2 PM", "Sunday at 3 PM", "Saturday at 5 PM"],
          "options_ko": ["토요일 오후 2시", "일요일 오후 3시", "토요일 오후 5시"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "請跟著A和B的對話，練習說出每一句話，注意約時間的用語。",
      "free_response_prompt": "請用中文說出你最近一次和朋友約會做什麼，包括你們約了什麼時間、去哪裡、做了什麼事。"
    },
    {
      "title": "Final Problem Task: 在便利商店退貨",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "不好意思，我昨天在這裡買了一個三明治，但是回家發現已經過期了。",
          "pinyin": "Bù hǎoyìsi, wǒ zuótiān zài zhèlǐ mǎi le yī ge sānmíngzhì, dànshì huí jiā fāxiàn yǐjīng guòqī le.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bu4 hao3yi4si, wo3 zuo2tian1 zai4 zhe4li3 mai3 le yi1 ge san1ming2zhi4, dan4shi4 hui2 jia1 fa1xian4 yi3jing1 guo4qi1 le.",
          "translation_en": "Excuse me, I bought a sandwich here yesterday, but when I got home I found it was already expired.",
          "translation_ko": "죄송합니다, 어제 여기서 샌드위치를 샀는데, 집에 가서 보니 이미 유통기한이 지났어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "真的嗎？不好意思，請讓我看看您的發票和商品。",
          "pinyin": "Zhēn de ma? Bù hǎoyìsi, qǐng ràng wǒ kànkan nín de fāpiào hé shāngpǐn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Zhen1 de ma? Bu4 hao3yi4si, qing3 rang4 wo3 kan4kan nin2 de fa1piao4 he2 shang1pin3.",
          "translation_en": "Really? I'm sorry, please let me see your receipt and the item.",
          "translation_ko": "정말요? 죄송합니다, 영수증과 상품을 좀 보여주시겠어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "好的，這是發票和三明治。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, zhè shì fāpiào hé sānmíngzhì.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, zhe4 shi4 fa1piao4 he2 san1ming2zhi4.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, here is the receipt and the sandwich.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 여기 영수증과 샌드위치입니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "對不起，這是我們的問題。我馬上幫您退錢，或者您要換一個新的？",
          "pinyin": "Duìbuqǐ, zhè shì wǒmen de wèntí. Wǒ mǎshàng bāng nín tuì qián, huòzhě nín yào huàn yī ge xīn de?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Dui4bu4qi3, zhe4 shi4 wo3men de wen4ti2. Wo3 ma3shang4 bang1 nin2 tui4 qian2, huo4zhe3 nin2 yao4 huan4 yi1 ge xin1 de?",
          "translation_en": "I'm sorry, this is our problem. I'll refund you right away, or would you like to exchange it for a new one?",
          "translation_ko": "죄송합니다, 저희 문제입니다. 바로 환불해 드리거나, 새 제품으로 교환해 드릴까요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "請幫我退錢，謝謝。",
          "pinyin": "Qǐng bāng wǒ tuì qián, xièxie.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Qing3 bang1 wo3 tui4 qian2, xie4xie.",
          "translation_en": "Please refund me, thank you.",
          "translation_ko": "환불해 주세요, 감사합니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "好的，這是退給您的錢，總共四十五塊。真的很抱歉。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, zhè shì tuì gěi nín de qián, zǒnggòng sìshíwǔ kuài. Zhēn de hěn bàoqiàn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, zhe4 shi4 tui4 gei3 nin2 de qian2, zong3gong4 si4shi2wu3 kuai4. Zhen1 de hen3 bao4qian4.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, here is your refund, 45 dollars in total. I'm really sorry.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 환불해 드린 돈입니다, 총 45원입니다. 정말 죄송합니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "沒關係，謝謝你的幫忙。",
          "pinyin": "Méi guānxi, xièxie nǐ de bāngmáng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Mei2 guan1xi, xie4xie ni3 de bang1mang2.",
          "translation_en": "It's okay, thank you for your help.",
          "translation_ko": "괜찮아요, 도와주셔서 감사합니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "Why did the customer want a refund?",
          "question_ko": "손님은 왜 환불을 원했습니까?",
          "options_en": ["The sandwich was expired", "The sandwich was too salty", "The sandwich was too expensive"],
          "options_ko": ["샌드위치가 유통기한이 지났다", "샌드위치가 너무 짰다", "샌드위치가 너무 비쌌다"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "請跟著客人和店員的對話，練習說出每一句話，注意退貨的用語。",
      "free_response_prompt": "請用中文說出你曾經退貨或換貨的經驗，包括你買了什麼、為什麼要退貨、店員怎麼處理。"
    }
  ]
}
